subject: Seminole Heights showing Saturday 2 PM
body_preview: Hi Brittany, we can do the 3411 W Bay Vista showing Saturday at 2. Should we bring the pre-approval letter?

subject: Re: Seminole Heights showing Saturday 2 PM
body_preview: Perfect, 2 PM works. Bring the pre-approval and I will have the disclosures printed. See you there.

subject: Westchase 4BR - comps for your review
body_preview: Lisa, attached are three recent 4BR comps near the Westchase listing so you can see where $525K sits. Happy to walk through them.

subject: School district question - Westchase
body_preview: Thanks Brittany. Can you confirm the elementary zoning for the Westchase house before we schedule a second visit?

subject: Waterfront options in South Tampa
body_preview: Brittany, relocation date from Miami is firming up. Any new waterfront listings around $450K I should see this month?

subject: Re: Waterfront options in South Tampa
body_preview: Dr. Ramirez, I have two Davis Islands prospects and one in Beach Park. I will send a curated set with flood context by Friday.

subject: Channelside condo - offer countered
body_preview: Seller countered the Channelside condo at $289K. Wanted you to see it before you take it back to your buyer.

subject: Staging schedule - Westchase listing
body_preview: Carlos, can you stage the Westchase home Thursday morning? Photos are booked with Gabriela for Friday at 10.

subject: Photo turnaround - Westchase
body_preview: Shots are done, edited gallery will be in your Dropbox within 24 hours as usual. The lanai light came out great.

subject: Pre-approval letter - Peterson file
body_preview: Attached is the updated pre-approval for the Petersons at $350K, valid 90 days. Let me know if they go higher.

subject: Inspection report - Seminole Heights
body_preview: Inspection is complete. Roof has 5 to 8 years left, minor GFCI items, full report attached. No major surprises.

subject: Title order - Channelside closing
body_preview: We opened title on the Channelside condo. Estimated closing statement will be ready once we have the executed contract.

subject: Re: Title order - Channelside closing
body_preview: Thanks Rachel, executed contract is coming through DocuSign today. I will forward the earnest money wire confirmation.

subject: Quarterly tax check-in
body_preview: Brittany, let us reconcile Q3 commission income and marketing spend before the estimated payment. Send the QuickBooks export.

subject: Westchase HOA estoppel
body_preview: The estoppel letter for the Westchase property is ready. Dues are current. I can email the PDF to the closing agent directly.

subject: Pool pump repair quote
body_preview: Quote for the pool pump: $450 to repair or $1,200 to replace. I can get to it next week if you want to move forward.

subject: Relocation lead - SunCoast network
body_preview: Routing you a relocation buyer from the national network moving to Tampa in the spring, budget around $600K. Details attached.

subject: Price reduction discussion - Seminole Heights
body_preview: Tom, I want to bring the Seminole Heights listing down to $379K after two weeks of soft traffic. Can we align before I call the seller?

subject: Closing wire instructions - do not change
body_preview: Reminder: wire instructions for the Channelside closing will not change. Please verify by phone before sending any funds.

subject: Agent happy hour headcount
body_preview: For the monthly happy hour, I have seven agents confirmed. Are we doing the Ybor spot again or somewhere new this time?

subject: Refi options for the Nguyens
body_preview: If the Nguyens sell first, I can structure a bridge loan so they are not carrying two mortgages. Worth a quick call this week.

subject: Convention travel - Orlando December 9
body_preview: Booked the Orlando hotel for the Florida Realtors convention on the 9th. Mom has the kids that night, all set.
